summary: Frontend testing iteration 20 - Testing new Dashboard Altair charts, KPI cards, sidebar on_change navigation, Container Map page and logout. Login works, Dashboard KPIs correct (430 straws, 16 active lots), Altair charts render visually, RECENT ACTIVITY and QUICK ACTIONS sections present. Primary sidebar navigation works correctly. CRITICAL BUG: secondary menu (Mais opções expander) radio click selects item visually but does NOT navigate to the page. Container Map IS accessible via Quick Actions 'View Map' button (redirect mechanism). Logout works.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking secondary menu items (e.g. 'Container Map') via radio button visually selects the item in the sidebar but does NOT navigate to that page. Dashboard content remains shown. The on_change callback (_on_secundaria_change) may not be triggering a proper page change or something resets _nav_last_active before the router runs.

issues: Console warns: 'The input spec uses Vega-Lite v5.20.1, but the current version of Vega-Lite is v6.3.1' - version mismatch between Altair-generated spec and installed Vega-Lite. Charts render but with warnings.

Console warns: 'WARN Infinite extent for field Palhetas_start/end: [Infinity, -Infinity]' - these fields don't exist in simple bar chart data, suggesting stacking spec issue in Vega-Lite v6 compatibility.
Console warns: 'WARN Dropping fit-x because spec has discrete width' - minor rendering warning.

action_items: FIX HIGH: Secondary sidebar navigation (Mais opções expander) - clicking 'Container Map' shows it selected but does NOT navigate. The on_change callback approach for secondary radio inside expander is not working. Workaround: navigation via Quick Actions buttons works via aba_selecionada+_nav_redirect_active mechanism. Fix suggestion: in _on_secundaria_change, also set st.session_state['aba_selecionada'] and call st.rerun(), similar to how Quick Actions work.

MINOR: Altair chart Vega-Lite version mismatch (spec v5.20.1 vs installed v6.3.1). Upgrade altair or pin vega-lite version. The Infinite extent warnings suggest stacking fields are being generated in spec unnecessarily.
MINOR: Container Map toolbar CSS class '.map-toolbar-shell' not detectable via JS querySelector - verify toolbar is rendering in the iframe component correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL: The _on_secundaria_change callback approach in render_sidebar() (ui_kit.py) is broken for navigating to secondary menu pages. When the secondary radio is clicked, _nav_last_active IS updated, but the page router doesn't navigate to the new page. This contrasts with Quick Actions which use aba_selecionada + rerun() which DOES work. The fix should standardize on the aba_selecionada+rerun pattern for secondary menu items too.

The secondary menu radio on_change callback fires and visually updates the sidebar, but the router check (if aba == t('menu.map')) fails or is overridden. Investigation shows _nav_last_active is set but the router doesn't execute the target page.
Altair v5 spec being generated by altair library but vega-lite v6 is installed - upgrade altair to v6 compatible version.

secondary_nav_bug.description: Clicking secondary menu items (Container Map, Import Semen, etc.) in 'Mais opções' expander does not navigate to the target page.
secondary_nav_bug.reproduction: 1. Login as admin/admin123. 2. Arrive at Dashboard. 3. Click 'Mais opções' expander. 4. Click 'Container Map' radio option. 5. Observe: sidebar shows Container Map selected, but main content remains Dashboard.
secondary_nav_bug.contrast: Quick Actions 'View Map' button on Dashboard DOES navigate correctly via st.session_state['aba_selecionada'] + st.rerun() mechanism.
secondary_nav_bug.hypothesis: The _on_secundaria_change callback may fire but the resulting rerun's page routing fails because either: (a) the _nav_last_active is reset by another widget event during the rerun, (b) the primary radio being rendered with index=0 (Dashboard) causes an unexpected session_state update, or (c) Streamlit does not trigger a full rerun after the on_change callback inside a nested expander context.
secondary_nav_bug.suggested_fix: Use the same aba_selecionada+_nav_redirect_active+rerun() pattern that Quick Actions use. In _on_secundaria_change, set st.session_state['_nav_redirect_active'] = st.session_state.get('menu_secundario_radio') and then call st.rerun(). This is the proven working mechanism.

success_rate.frontend: 80% (login, dashboard, primary nav, container map via quick action, logout all work; secondary nav radio click broken)

seed_data_creation: N/A - pre-existing data (430 straws, 16 active lots, Tavares de Almeida owner)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Primary sidebar navigation works. Dashboard Altair charts render with Vega-Lite v5/v6 version mismatch warnings (non-critical, visual rendering works). Main bug: secondary sidebar navigation (Mais opções expander radio click) does NOT navigate to target pages. Container Map IS accessible via Dashboard Quick Actions 'View Map' button. Logout works. KPI cards show 430 total straws, 16 active lots.

login.details: Login with admin/admin123 works, redirects to Dashboard

dashboard_kpi.details: 430 TOTAL STRAWS, 16 ACTIVE LOTS, 0 INSEMINATIONS TODAY, 0 CRITICAL STOCK - all correct

dashboard_altair_charts.details: Both 'Palhetas por Contentor' and 'Palhetas por Proprietário' Altair charts render visually. Vega-Lite v5/v6 version mismatch warnings in console (non-breaking).

dashboard_recent_activity.details: RECENT ACTIVITY section shows transfer and insemination data

dashboard_quick_actions.details: QUICK ACTIONS section visible with 4 buttons: New Insemination, New Transfer, Import Stock, View Map

primary_sidebar_navigation.details: All primary menu items (Dashboard, Add Stock, Register Insemination, Int/Ext Transf., View Stock, Reports) navigate correctly

secondary_sidebar_navigation_radio.details: Clicking 'Container Map' in 'Mais opções' expander visually selects it but does NOT navigate to Container Map page

container_map_via_quick_action.details: Container Map page loads correctly via Dashboard Quick Actions 'View Map' button. Shows 'Mapa dos Contentores' header.

logout.details: Log out button works, redirects to login page

top_spacing.details: Minimal top spacing achieved - padding-top: 0.4rem applied. No excessive whitespace at top.
